questions.question: Which of the following players was named the Men's Player of the Year at the All India Football Federation (AIFF) Awards in May 2025?
What is the name of India's high-resolution weather forecasting system launched in May 2025?
Kartik Aaryan won the Best Performance in a Leading Role (Male) award at the 25ᵗʰ IIFA Awards held in March 2025 at Jaipur for his performance in which of the following films?
Who was appointed as the Chief Election Commissioner of India in February 2025?
Which of the following organisations developed the nanoporous multilayered polymeric membrane for high-pressure seawater desalination in May 2025?
questions.option_2: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR)

questions.question: In which city was the agreement signed in March 2025 to resolve the border dispute between Kyrgyzstan and Tajikistan?
The February 2025 Technology Adoption Fund launched by IN‑SPACe has earmarked __________ to support private space start‑ups.
Which Indian airport secured a position among the top 10 hub airports in the Asia-Pacific and Middle East region in the 2024 ACI Hub Connectivity Rankings?

Which Indian Army officer has written the book titled ‘Ready, Relevant and Resurgent: A Blueprint for the Transformation of India’s Military’, which was unveiled by the Defence Minister Rajnath Singh in May 2025?
Where was Exercise Dharma Guardian, 2025, held?
Which DRDO-developed system, tested in 2025, is designed to detect and neutralise multiple types of underwater threats?
Which among the following two organisations signed an Memorandum of Understanding to establish an incubation centre promoting innovation in solar energy and green hydrogen in May 2025?
questions.option_1: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy and Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited
questions.option_2: National Institution for Transforming India Aayog and Indian Space Research Organisation
questions.option_3: National Solar Energy Federation of India and National Institute of Solar Energy
questions.option_4: Defence Research and Development Organisation and National Thermal Power Corporation

questions.question: In May 2025, DRDO inaugurated a new research centre focusing on which advanced technology?
Where was the 2025 Global Artificial Intelligence Summit & Awards (GAISA) held?
Exercise Desert Hunt 2025, an integrated tri-service special forces exercise was conducted by the Indian Air Force at which of the following stations?
In May 2025, IBM and TCS partnered with Andhra Pradesh to build the “Quantum Valley Tech Park” in __________.
China deployed a sophisticated Large Phased Array Radar (LPAR) system near the __________ raising concerns over increased surveillance capabilities.
Which of the following players was awarded with National Sports award 2024 in the field of Para-Badminton in January 2025?
Who was awarded the Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award in 2025 for his leadership in Indian hockey?
Which ISRO mission, in collaboration with JAXA, aims to explore the Moon's polar regions?

In May 2025, Union Home Minister Amit Shah laid the foundation stone for the permanent campus of the National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU) in Nagpur. At which location did this ceremony take place?
questions.option_4: Mouza Chicholi, Kamptee tehsil, Nagpur district

questions.question: Which of the following athletes set a new record in triple jump with a 15.66 m leap at the 2025 Khelo India Youth Games in May 2025?
One of the largest terminals in the world, Terminal-3 of the Indira Gandhi International Airport (IGIA), was inaugurated in which year with a capacity to handle up to 40 million passengers annually?
The 2025 Sheikh Zayed Book Award recognised which author as the Cultural Personality of the Year?
In 2025, which state achieved a major infrastructure milestone with the support of Indo-foreign collaboration?
